conversation.text: I'd be happy to help with that! To make sure I connect you with the right resources — are you an existing CINNOX customer, or are you new to us?
Great! May I start with your name?
Chris Tanaka, Tokyo Commerce Co., chris@tokyocommerce.jp, +81-3-1234-5678

Thanks, Chris! Let me confirm your details:

- **Name:** Chris Tanaka
- **Company:** Tokyo Commerce Co.
- **Email:** chris@tokyocommerce.jp
- **Phone:** +81-3-1234-5678

Is that correct?

Thank you, Chris! Your information has been saved.

Now, regarding your question about WhatsApp integration — let me look that up for you.Yes, CINNOX does support WhatsApp integration! According to our CINNOX product documentation, you can connect WhatsApp as a social channel using **360dialog** as the WhatsApp Business Solution Provider (BSP). This lets you manage WhatsApp enquiries right alongside your other channels like Messenger, WeChat, LINE, and email — all in one platform.

Would you like to know more about how to set it up, or do you have any other questions?
